title: OP speedrunner kit
description: The OP Speedrunner Kit is a Minecraft Java data pack that spawns a loot-filled custom chest near your spawn point to skip the early-game grind. Simply disable the vanilla bonus chest and look within a 30-block radius to find your gear.
body:
# ⚡ OP Speedrunner Kit: Your Ultimate Survival Head Start!

Skip the boring early-game grind and jump straight into the action! Whether you're aiming for a new personal best speedrun record or just want a massively overpowered start to your casual survival world, the **OP Speedrunner Kit** has exactly what you need to dominate from minute one.

## 🎁 What Does It Do?
Forget punching trees! This data pack generates a **custom, super-charged bonus chest** right near your spawn point. It is absolutely packed with top-tier, overpowered loot designed to get you straight to the Nether, the End, or building your dream base without the tedious early-game hassle.

## ⚙️ How to Use It (Important Setup)
To make sure the kit works perfectly, follow these quick steps when creating your new world:
1.  **Disable the Vanilla Bonus Chest:** Make sure you turn this OFF in your world settings. This pack replaces it with something *much* better!
2.  **Load In & Look Around:** Once you spawn, the custom OP Chest will generate automatically. 
3.  **The Treasure Hunt:** It won't be exactly under your feet! Explore within a **30-block radius** of your spawn point to locate the chest and claim your loot. 

![Jd](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2b3de49ddf04c86bf7840da3cb51beb2b8c9c764.png)


## 🚀 Who is this for?
* **Speedrunners:** Get those crucial early-game items instantly to shave minutes off your time and get straight to the speedrunning mechanics.
* **Casual Players:** Skip the wooden-tool phase and start your adventure with a massive advantage.
* **Content Creators:** Perfect for "OP Start" challenges, fast-paced multiplayer races, or Manhunts!

---

### ❓ What's in the Box? 
We won't spoil *all* the surprises, but expect tools, gear, and resources that will make you feel unstoppable right off the bat. You'll have to download it and open the chest to find out!

---
**Thanks for visiting and checking out the pack!** *Crafted with 🔥 by Error6119*

💬 **Want to suggest new OP loot or report a bug?** Hit the **Join Discord server** link on the side of the page to join the community! And don't forget to follow my profile for more awesome data packs.
